hero.headline: Vignan Online MBA in IT Management: Fees, Syllabus and Career Scope
hero.sub: UGC-DEB approved online MBA with IT Management specialisation from Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research, Guntur. NAAC A+, NIRF #70 University 2025, Deemed University. Rs 90,000 total fee across 4 semesters. Zero-cost EMI at Rs 5,700/month. Sem 3-4 covers Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP), Software Engineering, Database Management System, Technology Management, IT Project Management, and IT Privacy and Security.

sections.tldr: Vignan Online MBA IT Management: NAAC A+, UGC-DEB approved, NIRF #70 University 2025. Rs 90,000 total fee (4 semesters). Zero-cost EMI at Rs 5,700/month directly through Vignan. Sem 3-4 covers ERP, Software Engineering, DBMS, Technology Management, IT Project Management, and IT Privacy and Security. Among the cheapest NAAC A+ online MBAs with a dedicated IT management track in India.

about.body:
The Vignan Online MBA in IT Management is offered by Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research (VFSTR), a Deemed University established in Guntur, Andhra Pradesh. VFSTR holds NAAC A+ accreditation and UGC-DEB approval for its online programmes. NIRF ranks it #70 among universities in 2025.

The IT Management specialisation covers Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP), Software Engineering, Database Management System, Technology Management, IT Project Management, and IT Privacy and Security across Semesters 3 and 4. The syllabus covers IT governance, systems management, and project delivery rather than coding or data science.

At Rs 90,000 total, Vignan Online is among the cheapest UGC-DEB approved online MBAs with an IT management specialisation. The trade-off is limited brand recognition outside Andhra Pradesh and South India. For IT professionals moving into project management, ERP consulting, or technology leadership roles, Vignan IT Management is a practical option at minimum cost.

sem3Subjects.name: Business Environment and Strategy
sem3Subjects.description: Study the external business environment, strategic analysis frameworks, and formulation of competitive strategies.

sem3Subjects.name: Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP)
sem3Subjects.description: Study ERP system architecture, SAP/Oracle module overview, implementation lifecycle, and business process integration through ERP.

sem3Subjects.name: Software Engineering
sem3Subjects.description: Cover SDLC models, requirements engineering, software design principles, testing methodologies, and quality assurance.

sem3Subjects.name: Database Management System
sem3Subjects.description: Study relational database design, SQL fundamentals, normalisation, transaction management, and database administration concepts.

sem3Subjects.name: Research-Based Learning-I
sem3Subjects.description: Conduct structured research on an IT management topic using academic methodology, data collection, and analysis.

sem3Subjects.name: Open Elective
sem3Subjects.description: Choose from cross-functional electives offered by Vignan Online. Subject options confirmed at admission.

sem4Subjects.name: Entrepreneurship Development
sem4Subjects.description: Study business model creation, startup finance, venture capital, and entrepreneurial risk assessment.

sem4Subjects.name: Technology Management
sem4Subjects.description: Cover technology adoption models, IT strategy alignment with business goals, technology lifecycle management, and innovation governance.

sem4Subjects.name: IT Project Management
sem4Subjects.description: Study Agile and Waterfall methodologies, project scheduling, risk management, stakeholder communication, and delivery governance.

sem4Subjects.name: IT Privacy and Security
sem4Subjects.description: Cover cybersecurity frameworks, data privacy regulations (IT Act, GDPR basics), information security governance, and risk assessment.

sem4Subjects.name: Research-Based Learning-II
sem4Subjects.description: Complete an applied IT management research project with data analysis, findings presentation, and actionable recommendations.

syllabus.note: Sem 1-2 cover shared core subjects across all Vignan Online MBA specialisations. See the main Vignan Online MBA page for the core subject list. Syllabus applies to the 2025-26 admission cycle. Reconfirm current syllabus with our counsellor before enrolment.

whoHires.body:
IT Management MBA graduates target these industries and roles:

**Industries:** IT and IT services, ITES/BPO, Banking (IT divisions), Manufacturing (ERP teams), Consulting, Telecom, E-commerce

**Entry-level roles:** IT Analyst, Systems Analyst, ERP Consultant (Junior), Project Coordinator, IT Operations Executive

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years):** IT Project Manager, ERP Manager, Technology Manager, IT Business Analyst, Information Security Manager

**Senior roles (7+ years):** CTO, CIO, VP Technology, Head of IT Operations, Director of Digital Transformation

**Typical hiring organisations:** TCS, Infosys, Wipro, HCL Tech, Cognizant, Tech Mahindra, Accenture, IBM India, Capgemini, SAP India, Oracle India, HDFC Bank (IT), Reliance Jio, Tata Communications

skills.body:
The IT Management specialisation builds skills tested by IT services, consulting, and enterprise IT organisations:

**Technical skills:**
- ERP: SAP/Oracle module understanding, ERP implementation lifecycle, business process mapping, and change management for ERP rollouts
- Software Engineering: SDLC model selection, requirements gathering, software quality assurance, and testing strategy design
- DBMS: relational database design, SQL query writing, normalisation, and database performance tuning basics
- IT Privacy and Security: cybersecurity risk assessment, IT Act compliance, data privacy governance, and information security policy design

**Applied skills:**
- IT Project Management: Agile sprint planning, Waterfall milestone tracking, risk register maintenance, and delivery governance
- Technology Management: technology roadmap creation, build-vs-buy decision frameworks, and IT-business alignment strategy

**Soft skills:** Stakeholder communication for IT projects, vendor negotiation, cross-functional coordination between business and technology teams, and executive presentation of technology proposals.

comparisons.body:
Comparing Vignan Online MBA IT Management against peers:

**vs Sharda Online MBA (no IT spec):** Sharda (Rs 1,54,500) does not offer a dedicated IT Management specialisation. Vignan fills this gap at Rs 90,000 with dedicated ERP, DBMS, and IT Security subjects.

**vs JIIT Online MBA IT and BA (Rs 1,82,000):** JIIT is 2x the cost with mandatory internship and AI core. JIIT's programme blends IT with analytics and carries stronger brand recognition in the IT industry. Vignan covers traditional IT management at half the fee.

**vs NIU Online MBA IT (Rs 97,600):** NIU is Rs 7,600 more. Both are sub-Rs 1 lakh options. Vignan adds NIRF #70 ranking and dedicated ERP and Software Engineering subjects.

At Rs 90,000, Vignan is the cheapest NAAC A+ online MBA with a dedicated IT management track and NIRF ranking. The limitation is brand recognition outside Andhra Pradesh and a traditional IT syllabus without AI or cloud computing coverage.

fees.body:
The Vignan Online MBA in IT Management is priced at Rs 90,000 total program fee across 4 semesters (2-year programme). This makes Vignan Online among the most affordable UGC-DEB approved online MBAs in India.

**Zero-cost EMI**: Available directly through Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research starting Rs 5,700 per month. No external marketing partner or NBFC intermediary involved.

**Additional charges**: Registration, application, examination, and project fees are not separately documented on Vignan Online's portal. Please reconfirm all charges with our counsellor before enrolment.

EdifyEdu reconfirms fees with Vignan Online each quarter. Please reconfirm current fees and all applicable charges with our counsellor before any payment. Fees listed are indicative.

certificate.body: The degree certificate is issued by Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research, Guntur. It reads 'Master of Business Administration' with the IT Management specialisation noted on the marksheet and transcript. Online mode is identified per UGC-DEB 2020 regulations. The degree is valid for corporate hiring, PSU eligibility, and higher education admission across India.

reviews.intro: Three reviews from Vignan Online MBA IT Management students. Ratings from post-completion feedback.

items.name: Arun
items.liked: ERP and DBMS subjects were directly relevant to my SAP consulting role. Rs 90,000 total is genuinely the cheapest NAAC A+ IT management MBA available.
items.disliked: No cloud computing, DevOps, or AI subjects. The syllabus is traditional IT management, not modern tech leadership.
items.body: I work as a junior SAP consultant. The ERP subject covered implementation lifecycle and business process integration, which I use daily. IT Project Management gave me Agile frameworks that improved my sprint planning. At Rs 90,000, the ROI came through a promotion within a year. For SAP, ERP, and database professionals, this is a solid credential.

items.name: Meena
items.liked: IT Privacy and Security subject was timely and well-structured. Zero-cost EMI made it easy to manage alongside rent and other expenses.
items.disliked: Vignan brand recognition at IT companies in Hyderabad is limited compared to Manipal, BITS, or Amity. For IT manager roles at top-tier companies, the brand does not carry weight.
items.body: The IT management syllabus covers the basics well. But Hyderabad IT hiring managers expect MBA brands they recognise. If you are already at a mid-size IT company and need the credential for promotion, Vignan works. For lateral moves to TCS, Infosys, or Wipro management tracks, invest in a stronger brand. The programme content is fine for the price, but brand is the bottleneck.

items.name: Srinivas
items.liked: Software Engineering and IT Project Management were the strongest subjects. The research projects pushed applied learning.
items.disliked: Career services for online students are minimal. No IT job fairs or recruiter connections.
items.body: Good programme for working IT professionals in Andhra Pradesh and Telangana. The Technology Management subject in Sem 4 helped me think about IT strategy beyond daily operations. At Rs 90,000 with no-cost EMI, the financial barrier is essentially zero. Just pair it with PMP or ITIL certifications for stronger positioning in the IT management job market.

faqs.question: Is Rs 90,000 the total Vignan Online MBA fee?
faqs.answer: Yes. Rs 90,000 is the total programme fee spread across 4 semesters. Reconfirm any additional charges for registration, examination, or project with our counsellor before enrolment.

faqs.question: Does Vignan offer zero-cost EMI?
faqs.answer: Yes. Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research offers zero-cost EMI directly at Rs 5,700 per month. No external NBFC or marketing partner is involved.

faqs.question: What is Vignan's NAAC grade?
faqs.answer: Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research holds NAAC A+ accreditation. Verify the current status at naac.gov.in.

faqs.question: Does the IT Management specialisation cover cloud computing or AI?
faqs.answer: No. The syllabus focuses on ERP, Software Engineering, DBMS, IT Project Management, Technology Management, and IT Privacy and Security. Cloud computing and AI are not part of the current curriculum.

faqs.question: How does Vignan IT Management compare to JIIT IT and BA on fees?
faqs.answer: Vignan IT Management costs Rs 90,000 total. JIIT IT and BA costs approximately Rs 1,82,000. JIIT is 2x the price but includes mandatory internship, AI core, and stronger IT industry brand recognition.

chooseIf: You want a NAAC A+, UGC-DEB approved online MBA in IT Management at Rs 90,000 total fee.
You work in ERP consulting, IT project management, or IT operations and need the MBA credential for promotion.
You want zero-cost EMI at Rs 5,700/month directly through the university with no NBFC intermediary.
consider: If you want modern tech coverage (AI, cloud, DevOps), JIIT IT and BA (Rs 1,82,000) or higher-tier programmes are better fits.
If you want a similarly priced alternative with IT focus, NIU IT (Rs 97,600) is another sub-Rs 1 lakh option.
If brand recognition at top IT companies matters, consider programmes from NIRF top-50 universities at a higher fee point.
